title: Possible database corruption following EINTR on unix
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'test1');
key_bug_features: Database corruption after EINTR signal on Unix systems
